chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 685 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 22.10.2025 Mr. Shoaib Niaz Khaskheli, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner by filing statement places on record certain documents, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned Assistant AG. The grievance of the Petitioner is that the illegal Jhattas / Pipes, which have been installed in watercourse No.61 emanating from Faiz Wah by the officials of the irrigation department for providing illegal water to the other khatedars be removed from the said watercourse with further prayer to repair the watercourse. Nabi Bux Leghari, Executive Engineer, Irrigation West Division, Khairpur present in Court submits that recently he has been posted and further undertook that the grievance of the petitioner would be redressed within shortest period of time. In the circumstances, the Respondent No.7 / Executive Engineer, Irrigation West Division, Khairpur is directed to look into the prayer clause of the Petitioner and redress his grievance within thirty days. In case of failure, the contempt proceedings shall be initiated against the Respondents. The Petition is disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI
